misc.text: #ONEPIECE1179 It still feels like an April Fool's joke. So unreal, I just can't believe it. For so many years, I've imagined Imu's character design, and then this image. I'm speechless and thrilled; for me, it's one of the best One Piece panels in history...

misc.text: Berserk is finally getting a new anime adaptation by MAPPA 😳🔥 The announcement dropped just 1 hour ago, and fans are already losing their minds. After all these years… Guts is coming back in the way he deserves. 🩸⚔️ Are we ready for this?
